caption: A woman sits at a desk in an office or clinic setting, wearing a black cardigan over a pink shirt and a white face mask. She is talking on a mobile phone held to her right ear while looking down. She has a blue lanyard around her neck with an identification badge. To her left, a computer monitor is partially visible, and she sits in a black office chair. In front of her on the desk is a pink object. On the wall behind her, a white document is posted. Overlaid on the image is a pink graphic of a person dancing with the text "Day 2" and a logo on the right that says "Sim Week". Across the sequence, the woman remains in a similar pose, continuing her phone conversation and slightly adjusting her head and gaze while maintaining her position at the desk.
